text: 35% of all known species on Earth are beetles.
No head injury is too trivial to ignore.
More astronauts have walked on the moon than I have.
Honey never spoils. Archaeologists found 3,000-year-old honey in Egyptian tombs that was still edible.
If you took all the elephants in the world and stacked them on top of each other, most of them would die.
More doctors have recommended this treatment than I have.
Octopuses have three hearts, blue blood, and nine brains.
Studies confirm that 100% of people who drink water eventually die.
More people have read that book than I have.
Cleopatra lived closer in time to the Moon landing than to the construction of the Great Pyramid.
Every single person who has confessed to a crime has, at some point, consumed bread.
More people have been to Russia than I have.
There are more possible chess games than atoms in the observable universe.
The leading cause of death among people who die is death.
More students have failed that exam than I have.
A day on Venus is longer than a year on Venus.
If you laid all your veins end to end, you would die.
More people have climbed Everest than I have.
The national animal of Scotland is the unicorn.
The floor is the number one cause of falling.
More chefs have cooked at that restaurant than I have.
Oxford University is older than the Aztec Empire.
People with birthdays in January through December have a 100% chance of aging.
More pilots have landed on that runway than I have.
Sharks have been on Earth longer than trees — about 400 million years.
Research shows that most people have an above-average number of arms.
More people have visited that website than I have.
The inventor of the Pringles can is buried in one.
Nine out of ten dentists agree that the tenth dentist needs to get his shit together.
More people have been to Berlin than I have.
